title: てんとう虫が離れても

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower and I are on the way back to campus
after going out. Suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look, Big Brother!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look, Big Sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On Rice Shower's outstretched finger rests a very
small ladybug.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ladybugs are a sign of good luck. Did you know
that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time one's ever landed on me...
Maybe something good is going to happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bit later, Rice Shower stops at a vending
machine to buy juice, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no way! I won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower blinks in surprise as the word
“Winner” flickers vibrantly on the vending
machine's display.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I've never won anything from a vending
machine before in my life.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower hangs her head as if she's uneasy for
some reason.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm a little scared.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I have good luck now... that probably means...
I'm going to bring bad luck to everyone else
later...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Because... that's what always happens.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I think... what worries me the most...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Is the fact that I always end up having these
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though something good happened to me...
and I'm here with you... I still think this way.
choice_data_list:
Well, you'll just have to create enough
happiness to offset that misfortune.

We can turn misfortune into memories too, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though something good happened to me...
and I'm here with you... I still think this way.
choice_data_list:
Well, you'll just have to create enough
happiness to offset that misfortune.

We can turn misfortune into memories too, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You're right. That is my goal, after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I can't help but wonder... can I really do it? Is
it pointless to even try?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to do it on my own, but
maybe I can do it with you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to do it on my own, but
maybe I can do it with you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Or at least, I will someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Rice Shower's feeling more
optimistic, even if just a little.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Turn misfortune... into memories?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've never thought of it that way before. Can you
really do that?
choice_data_list:
I'll turn any bad luck into a memory of being
with you.

I'll turn any bad luck into a memory of being
with you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: As long as you're with me, I'll try to do the same...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: As long as you're with me, I'll try to do the same...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No... I will do the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower's expression lightens a little.
